visual_description: A hand in a maroon sleeve pulls a chain lock on a partially opened door. A woman in a blue robe carries a blonde child wearing a red sweater through a tiled bathroom toward a frosted window. The view then changes to a snow‑covered roof at night with streetlights, followed by a close‑up of a person peering through a window.
